title: Onboarding: guided, animated persona-authoring flow
description: Rebuild onboarding to the Atelier theme (remove the off-brand inline cool-gray styles). Turn the flat form into a guided, lively persona-authoring experience: sectioned/stepped reveal, animated field focus + validation feedback, a celebratory success state, and a live persona 'voice' preview if cheap. Consume Atelier tokens + Button primitive. Keep all existing form semantics, a11y (aria-live), and tests green.
close_reason: Shipped (1cc5a51): onboarding rebuilt to Atelier — 3 titled movements, progress rail, inline validation, live voice preview, celebratory success; Button primitive throughout; all original semantics + aria-live preserved. 8/8 onboarding tests.

title: Homepage: landing hero + signature first-load motion
description: Replace the bare backend-health homepage with a real landing hero that wows on first visit: editorial hero (eyebrow, serif display headline, lead, primary CTA into onboarding), a signature staggered first-load animation ('ink settling'), and the backend-health demoted to a tasteful, non-blocking status chip. Must consume Atelier tokens + motion utilities only. Accessible + prefers-reduced-motion safe.
close_reason: Shipped (1cc5a51): editorial landing hero replacing the health check, ~860ms signature first-load choreography (draw-rule + stagger), health demoted to a non-blocking mono chip. Token-only, a11y clean, reduced-motion safe. 10 tests in scope.

Backward compatible with existing runs-ui.css var names. This is the shared dependency for the homepage + onboarding agents.
close_reason: Atelier foundation shipped + committed (3e2d2e9): full token schema + 'ink & paper' motion utilities (reduced-motion safe) in globals.css; shared Button primitive + buttonClass(); contract at specs/design/atelier.md. +6 tests, suite 127 green, build clean.

title: [TDD] Run-engine instrumentation behind injected telemetry dep
description: Wrap run span + per-phase child spans (record run.phase.duration), record errors on the metered() fault path (agent.errors + span.recordException), increment checkpoint.failures on failed gates, run.outcomes on terminal transitions, mirror usage into tokens.total. Inject telemetry as a dep; no-op default keeps CI deterministic + all existing tests green.
notes: Also instrument the new metrics: record run.attempts at research/refine loop exit (ctx.attempt); checkpoint.score in recordCheckpoint when result.score!=undefined; run.duration at each terminal transition; runs.active +1 start / -1 on publish|fail|abort (NOT awaiting_approval); tokens.cached_input alongside tokens.total when usage.cachedInputTokens present. All via injected no-op telemetry dep. See ADDENDUM-metrics.md.
close_reason: Implemented + integrated + pushed to origin/main (commit 19d786c). 11 metrics, traces, /admin/telemetry, env-gated, no-op CI. 530 tests green.

title: [TDD] GET /admin/telemetry curated metrics endpoint (admin-gated)
description: Returns the curated JSON snapshot the admin page renders: latency avg/p95, phase-duration avgs, error counts by type, outcomes by status, token totals. Read from the OTel Prometheus registry or a small in-process aggregator. Gate behind requireAdmin (Epic 2; stub guard + TODO until it lands).
close_reason: Implemented + integrated + pushed to origin/main (commit 19d786c). 11 metrics, traces, /admin/telemetry, env-gated, no-op CI. 530 tests green.

title: [TDD] Telemetry metrics module (6 instruments + injectable no-op API)
description: backend/src/telemetry/metrics.ts — the 6 instruments (http.server.duration, run.phase.duration, agent.errors, checkpoint.failures, run.outcomes, tokens.total) + typed API (recordError/recordPhaseDuration/recordOutcome/recordCheckpointFailure/recordTokens/startRunSpan). Injectable; no-op default for tests.
notes: Implement 11 instruments (not 6): original http.server.duration, run.phase.duration, agent.errors, checkpoint.failures, run.outcomes, tokens.total PLUS run.attempts(hist,phase), checkpoint.score(hist 0-1,gate), run.duration(hist ms), runs.active(updowncounter), tokens.cached_input(counter,phase,workerId). API gains: recordRunAttempts, recordCheckpointScore, recordRunDuration, runStarted/runEnded, recordTokens(cached). See ADDENDUM-metrics.md.
close_reason: Implemented + integrated + pushed to origin/main (commit 19d786c). 11 metrics, traces, /admin/telemetry, env-gated, no-op CI. 530 tests green.

Start before app in server.ts. Guard with OTEL_ENABLED (off in test/CI). try/catch so OTel never breaks the pipeline.

title: OpenTelemetry & System Telemetry

Source of ERROR TRACKING + system insights for the admin observability page. Env-gated (OTEL_ENABLED), Prometheus exporter in-process + optional OTLP, no-op in CI. Brief: specs/003-observability-otel/BRIEF.md. OWNER: Kerrigan. DO FIRST.
notes: Metric set expanded 6->11 per review (Valerian): +run.attempts, +checkpoint.score, +run.duration, +runs.active, +tokens.cached_input. Rationale in specs/003-observability-otel/ADDENDUM-metrics.md. Same constraints (env-gated, no-op in CI, TDD).

title: [TDD] Final approval gate — passing webpage enters draft/awaiting-approval, publishes only on user approval (HITL)
description: New requirement (General): once all gates pass, the webpage does NOT auto-publish. It enters a 'draft' / awaiting-approval state and pauses for a FINAL human-in-the-loop approval gate. The user approves → Sink.publish; or requests changes/rejects. This is the closing HITL gate of the loop. Touches the orchestrator publish path (escalation-style pause with an approve→publish decision), run status (e.g. awaiting_approval), a RunEvent for the await state, and the UI approve action. Distinct from mid-run escalation.
close_reason: Final approval gate: passing draft → awaiting_approval pause → publishes only on user approval. Reuses escalation pause/resume + existing UI. 501 tests green.

title: [TDD] Research-sufficiency: re-research once before alerting (research-light)
description: Today the orchestrator escalates IMMEDIATELY on a failed research-sufficiency gate (no re-research). Change: on insufficiency, re-run the research phase ONCE (passing the gate's guidance to the agent so it goes broader), then re-check. If it still can't clear RESEARCH_MIN_SOURCES, escalate with a 'topic appears research-light' alert (enrich/approve/abort). Bounded at exactly one retry (2 research attempts total) — never loops forever. Pillar 3 + spine.
close_reason: Re-research once then research-light alert; bounded at MAX_RESEARCH_ATTEMPTS=2. backend 301 tests green.

title: [TDD] Async run mode — POST /runs returns runId immediately, engine streams live (real-agent UX)
description: Track G's POST /runs currently AWAITS the terminal/paused outcome (deterministic, great for MockAgent). For the real-research agent (slow), the UI must POST -> get runId immediately -> open SSE -> watch the four lanes fill LIVE. Change: fire the engine promise, return 201 {runId}; the event bus already supports live tailing. Keep the deterministic path for tests. Needed for the real-agent live demo. Flagged by Track G.
close_reason: Async run mode merged: POST /runs returns 202 {runId} immediately, engine streams live; waitFor keeps tests deterministic; R2 proof + SSE unchanged. 300 BE tests.

title: [TDD] Real-research worker (@anthropic-ai/sdk + server-side web_search) — R8/R11 swap
description: REVISED D13 (General: real research mandatory). New Agent impl AnthropicResearchAgent using the OFFICIAL @anthropic-ai/sdk Messages API + server-side web_search tool (the @ai-sdk/anthropic@1.2.12 wrapper lacks web tools; major SDK upgrade rejected). research() returns a synthesized narrative + REAL source URLs; research-sufficiency gates on genuine sources. Becomes the 2nd swappable worker (A=Vercel AI SDK, B=native Anthropic+web_search) — stronger R8/R11 live swap than opus->sonnet. Runs locally behind ngrok; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env-gated, never in CI (D20). Scripted MockAgent stays as CI default + R2 fallback. Adjutant-agent worker = future swap (north star). Model claude-opus-4-8, adaptive thinking. See ASSUMPTIONS.md D13.
close_reason: Real-research worker merged: native @anthropic-ai/sdk web_search, real sources, 3rd swappable worker. 99% cov.

title: Next.js + React + TS strict scaffold (Vitest + RTL)
description: frontend/ Next.js (App Router) + React + TypeScript strict. Configure Vitest + @testing-library/react + jsdom (vitest.config.ts, test setup). Add a minimal app/layout.tsx + app/page.tsx placeholder. Acceptance: 'npm run build' (next build) exits 0; 'npm test' runs a trivial RTL render test. Files: /frontend/app/{layout.tsx,page.tsx}, /frontend/vitest.config.ts, /frontend/tests/setup.ts. Deploys to Vercel (control plane).
close_reason: Next.js 14 App Router + TS strict + Vitest/RTL/jsdom; next build compiles + typechecks clean

title: [TDD] Health shell page — proves FE<->BE seam
description: A landing/shell page that fetches the backend GET /health and renders status. Use a typed API client (frontend/lib/api.ts) reading NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE. Render ALL states intentionally (product/UX rule): loading, success (status ok), error (backend down). TDD: frontend/tests/unit/health-shell.test.tsx FIRST — 3 tests: initial/loading, success render, error state — mocking fetch. Files: /frontend/app/page.tsx, /frontend/lib/api.ts, /frontend/tests/unit/health-shell.test.tsx. Accessible: status announced via aria-live, semantic markup.
close_reason: Health-shell page fetches /health via typed lib/api; loading/success/error states + aria-live; 6 tests (page+api), coverage 100/91.66/100

title: [TDD] Health endpoint vertical slice (GET /health)
description: First full TDD vertical slice through all layers: route handler -> health service -> response {status:'ok', version, uptime}. CORS enabled for the frontend origin. TDD: backend/tests/integration/health.test.ts (supertest: 200 + body shape) and backend/tests/unit/health.service.test.ts (3 tests) written FIRST. Files: /backend/src/routes/health.ts, /backend/src/services/health.service.ts, /backend/tests/integration/health.test.ts, /backend/tests/unit/health.service.test.ts. Min 2 tests/endpoint + 3/service method (constitution).
close_reason: GET /health route->service slice; 3 unit + 3 integration tests; backend coverage 100/92.85/100

title: Backend skeleton — Express, layered dirs, Vitest+coverage
description: backend/ Node+TS+Express app with layered structure: src/routes (handlers, no logic), src/services (business logic), src/stores (data access). Wire vitest.config.ts with coverage thresholds (lines 80 / branches 70 / functions 60). Add src/app.ts (Express factory) + src/server.ts (boot). Acceptance: 'npm run build' (tsc) exits 0; 'npm test' runs (even with a trivial test). Files: /backend/src/{app.ts,server.ts}, /backend/src/routes/, /backend/src/services/, /backend/src/stores/, /backend/vitest.config.ts. Constitution rule 4 (layered architecture).
close_reason: Express factory + layered dirs (routes/services/stores) + Vitest coverage config (80/70/60)

title: [TDD] Env validation module + .env.example
description: backend/src/config/env.ts: parse + validate process.env with Zod at boot (fail-fast). Keys: NODE_ENV, PORT(default 4000), ANTHROPIC_API_KEY(optional in dev — mock agent default), DATABASE_PATH(default ./publisher.db), USE_REAL_AGENT(bool, default false). TDD: backend/tests/unit/env.test.ts FIRST — valid env parses, missing/invalid throws clear error, defaults applied. Add /.env.example documenting every key. Constitution rule 2 (runtime validation at boundaries). Files: /backend/src/config/env.ts, /backend/tests/unit/env.test.ts, /.env.example.
close_reason: Zod env validation (fail-fast, USE_REAL_AGENT requires key) + .env.example; 6 unit tests

title: [TDD] Zod contracts + inferred types (Webpage, Persona, Alarm)
description: In shared/src/contracts/: define Zod schemas as the single source of truth and infer TS types. WebpageSchema {title,html,css,summary,sourcesUsed:string[]}; PersonaSchema {id,name,voice,stylePoints[],keyLearnings[],designElements}; AlarmSchema {type,severity,context,recommendedAction}. Export both schema + inferred type. TDD: write shared/tests/unit/contracts.test.ts FIRST — min 3 per schema (valid parse, invalid rejected, edge: empty arrays/missing optional). Files: /shared/src/contracts/{webpage,persona,alarm}.ts, /shared/src/index.ts, /shared/tests/unit/contracts.test.ts. Mock data must use real output shapes (constitution).
close_reason: Zod contracts (Webpage/Persona/Alarm) + inferred types in shared/; 12 unit tests pass (valid/invalid/edge per schema)

title: Shared TypeScript strict base config
description: Add /tsconfig.base.json with strict:true, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, exactOptionalPropertyTypes, module/moduleResolution set for Node+bundler. Each workspace tsconfig.json extends it. Acceptance: 'tsc --noEmit' runs clean in each workspace against the base. Files: /tsconfig.base.json, /backend/tsconfig.json, /frontend/tsconfig.json, /shared/tsconfig.json. Constitution rule 2 (strict mode, no implicit any).
close_reason: tsconfig.base.json (strict, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, exactOptionalPropertyTypes) extended by all workspaces; verified via shared tsc build

title: Scaffold npm-workspaces monorepo
description: Create root package.json with npm workspaces over backend/, frontend/, shared/. Add .nvmrc (Node 20 LTS), root .gitignore additions (node_modules, dist, .next, *.db, .env), and create the three workspace dirs with placeholder package.json each. Acceptance: 'npm install' from root links all three workspaces; 'npm ls --workspaces' resolves. Files: /package.json, /.nvmrc, /backend/package.json, /frontend/package.json, /shared/package.json.
close_reason: Monorepo scaffolded; npm install links all 3 workspaces (@publisher/{shared,backend,frontend}); ai@4.3.19 + @ai-sdk/anthropic@1.2.12 installed

title: Phase 3 — Backend Scaffold
description: backend/ Node+TS strict, layered skeleton (routes/handlers -> services -> stores), Vitest w/ coverage thresholds, env validation, and a health endpoint as the first full TDD vertical slice.
close_reason: Phase complete

title: Phase 4 — Frontend Scaffold
description: frontend/ Next.js + React + TS strict, Vitest + @testing-library/react, and a landing/shell page that fetches the backend /health endpoint to prove the FE<->BE seam end-to-end.
close_reason: Phase complete

title: Phase 2 — Shared Contracts
description: shared/ workspace: Zod schemas as source of truth + inferred TS types for the cross-tier contracts (Webpage {title,html,css,summary,sourcesUsed}, Persona, Alarm). FE and BE both import these.
close_reason: Phase complete

title: Phase 1 — Workspace Foundation
description: Monorepo + workspace setup and shared TS strict base config. Blocks all other phases. Layout: root npm workspaces over backend/, frontend/, shared/ per test conventions in .claude/rules/03-testing.md.
close_reason: Phase complete

title: Publisher Bootstrap — Scaffold & Project Init
description: Root epic. Stand up the Publisher project skeleton (monorepo, backend, frontend, SQLite, shared contracts, Agent seam stub, dev tooling/CI) so build-day execution of the four harness pillars can move fast. Foundation only — NO pillar implementations here. Source: docs/architecture-defense.md, docs/agent-integration.md, docs/publisher-design.html (build order §10).
close_reason: Bootstrap epic complete: monorepo + shared contracts + backend (Express layered, /health, env) + frontend (Next.js health-shell) + SQLite/PersonaStore + Agent seam (Mock default, env-gated Anthropic) + lint/CI. 47 tests pass, coverage gates met, lint zero-warning, full build green, backend serves /health live.

title: Runs live-lane motion: make the harness feel alive (Atelier)
description: A motion pass on the live run surface (components/runs-ui.css + the lane/pillar/timeline components) so events arrive with considered motion — lane entries animate in, the working/active pillar breathes, draft timeline transitions. Reuse globals motion utilities/tokens; reduced-motion safe. Keep ALL runs tests green (escalation/demo/run-state).
close_reason: Shipped in beb0cc2; full gate green (223 tests, coverage 98.4/89.9/91.0, build clean).

title: Personas micro-interactions: list + detail polish (Atelier)
description: Bring the personas list (app/personas/page.tsx) and detail (app/personas/[id]) to the Atelier bar: card hover lift, staggered list reveal, refined detail typography/spacing, tasteful edit/save affordances using the Button primitive. Token-only CSS. Preserve all existing semantics + tests.
close_reason: Shipped in beb0cc2; full gate green (223 tests, coverage 98.4/89.9/91.0, build clean).

title: App shell + nav: persistent wayfinding header (Atelier)
description: A shared app shell/nav giving wayfinding across home/onboarding/personas/runs. Integrate into app/layout.tsx INSIDE the existing auth <Providers>. Use the existing auth context (app/auth/AuthContext useAuth) for the signed-in/account + logout affordance — do NOT reinvent auth. Token-only styling in a scoped shell css; subtle entrance + active-route treatment. Keep gate green.
close_reason: Shipped in beb0cc2; full gate green (223 tests, coverage 98.4/89.9/91.0, build clean).

title: SSE run-stream + auth: EventSource can't send Bearer; needs token query-param or cookie before /runs/:id/events is hard-gated
description: The live run stream uses EventSource (GET /runs/:id/stream), which cannot send an Authorization header. Run routes are currently auth opt-in via jwtSecret. Before the SSE stream is requireAuth-gated in production, add a signed token query-param (or cookie) auth path for SSE. Flagged by AuthIntegrate.
close_reason: Backlog cleared, merged to origin/main (3903357): flaky test fixed, sub-routes gated, SSE token-param auth.

title: Flaky: run-detail-page error-path test fails under full-suite concurrency
description: frontend/tests/unit/run-detail-page.test.tsx > 'should fall back to the query-param persona/worker hints when the header fails (error path)' fails intermittently in the full parallel suite but passes 3/3 in isolation. Likely an async/shared-state race in the error path. Not formatting-related (whitespace-only). Surfaced during observability epic push by Valerian. Owning: frontend track.
close_reason: Backlog cleared, merged to origin/main (3903357): flaky test fixed, sub-routes gated, SSE token-param auth.

title: Atelier pass 2: personas + runs micro-interactions + lane motion
description: Extend the Atelier uplift beyond the hero surfaces (deferred from the first pass): a shared app shell/nav for wayfinding, micro-interactions on the personas list + detail, and a motion pass on the live run pillar lanes so the harness feels alive while working. Consume the existing token schema + motion utilities; keep the gate green.
close_reason: Superseded by children 3jm.6/.7/.8 (shell, personas, runs motion) — all shipped.

Composes domain SQLite aggregates with the OTel curated snapshot.

title: .env + docs for OTel (OTEL_ENABLED, OTLP endpoint, local Jaeger note)

title: Observability Pages (User + Admin)
description: Per-user observability page: token costs, # research loops, failed vs published articles, total token cost across published articles + per individual article. Mirrored ADMIN page with aggregate stats: avg system latency, avg research/publish loop duration, rejected/published ratio, aggregate token totals, and ERROR TRACKING + system metrics from OpenTelemetry. Domain numbers from SQLite projections; error/system metrics from OTel (/admin/telemetry). Depends on Auth (user scoping + admin role) and OpenTelemetry.
close_reason: Observability Pages epic complete and on origin/main.

title: UI polish: 'Approve & Publish' affordance for the final approval gate + /runs/demo shows it
description: dp0.13 backend pauses passing drafts at awaiting_approval, surfaced as an AWAITING_APPROVAL (info) escalation — the existing escalation panel already renders approve/reject so it FUNCTIONS. Polish: when an escalation's alarm.type === AWAITING_APPROVAL, relabel the panel as 'Draft ready — Approve & Publish / Request changes / Discard' (not 'approve anyway'), and update the /runs/demo mock stream to show the draft→approval→publish beat so the demo showcases the final HITL gate. Frontend only.
close_reason: Approval gate relabels to 'Approve & Publish / Request changes / Discard' when alarm.type=AWAITING_APPROVAL; reducer folds it to awaiting_approval (calm green) not escalated; /runs/demo gains a 'Draft → approve & publish' narrative showing the full draft→approval→publish beat. +7 tests, full FE suite 121 green, tsc+lint clean.

title: GitHub Actions CI — blocking lint+build+coverage gate
description: .github/workflows/ci.yml: on push/PR, matrix or sequential — npm ci, lint (zero warnings), build (all workspaces), test:coverage (enforce 80/70/60 thresholds). Gate is BLOCKING (constitution rule 3, .claude/rules/08-code-review.md: CI is the hard gate). Acceptance: workflow runs green on the scaffold. Files: /.github/workflows/ci.yml. Confirm node version matches .nvmrc.
close_reason: GitHub Actions ci.yml: npm ci -> lint -> format:check -> build -> test:coverage, Node from .nvmrc, blocking on push/PR to main

title: ESLint flat config + Prettier + root npm scripts
description: Root ESLint flat config (eslint.config.js) with typescript-eslint, zero-warning policy (--max-warnings=0). Prettier config. Root npm scripts that fan out to workspaces: build, test, test:coverage, lint, dev (concurrently runs backend + frontend). Acceptance: 'npm run lint' exits 0 with zero warnings; 'npm run dev' boots both apps. Files: /eslint.config.js, /.prettierrc, /package.json (scripts). Constitution rule 3 (zero lint warnings).
close_reason: ESLint flat config (typescript-eslint) zero-warning + Prettier + root scripts (build/test/test:coverage/lint/format/dev); lint clean

title: [TDD] Agent interface + deterministic MockAgent
description: Define the ONE Agent seam: backend/src/agent/agent.ts exporting interface Agent { research(persona,concept): Promise<ResearchResult>; build(persona,research,feedback?): Promise<Webpage> }. Webpage type from shared contracts. MockAgent: deterministic, token-free impl returning canned-but-real-shaped output (for harness dev/test). TDD: backend/tests/unit/mock-agent.test.ts FIRST — research returns sources, build returns valid Webpage (passes WebpageSchema), feedback alters output. Files: /backend/src/agent/{agent.ts,mock-agent.ts}, /backend/tests/unit/mock-agent.test.ts. Constitution rule 4: agent behind one boundary (swappability bonus).
close_reason: Agent interface + compilePersonaSystem + deterministic MockAgent (token-free default); 5 unit tests; agent.ts 100% cov

title: AnthropicAgent skeleton (Vercel AI SDK, env-gated)
description: Real Agent impl using ai + @ai-sdk/anthropic per docs/agent-integration.md: research() via generateText with anthropic web_search/web_fetch tools + stopWhen; build() via generateObject(WebpageSchema). Selected ONLY when env USE_REAL_AGENT=true && ANTHROPIC_API_KEY present; otherwise MockAgent (no tokens burned by default). Add agent factory backend/src/agent/index.ts. Skeleton may be lightly tested (network mocked) — do NOT call the live API in CI. Files: /backend/src/agent/anthropic-agent.ts, /backend/src/agent/index.ts. Verify exact SDK tool-version tags against installed package before relying on them.
close_reason: AnthropicAgent skeleton (ai+@ai-sdk/anthropic, generateText/generateObject) + env-gated createAgent factory; AI SDK mocked in tests (no live calls); provider web-tool gap filed as follow-up

title: [TDD] Personas table migration + PersonaStore
description: First persistence slice. Migration 0001_personas.sql creating personas (id, name, voice, style_points json, key_learnings json, design_elements json, created_at). PersonaStore interface + better-sqlite3 impl: create(persona), getById(id), list(). Validate rows against shared PersonaSchema on read (runtime validation). TDD: backend/tests/unit/persona.store.test.ts FIRST using in-memory sqlite — 3+ per method (happy, not-found/error, edge empty list). Files: /backend/migrations/0001_personas.sql, /backend/src/stores/persona.store.ts, /backend/tests/unit/persona.store.test.ts. Other tables (runs/checkpoints/alarms/metrics/escalations/webpages) deferred to build-day pillar epics.
close_reason: 0001_personas.sql + PersonaStore (create/getById/list) validating rows vs PersonaSchema; 4 unit tests via real migration on in-memory db; boot wires migrations

title: [TDD] SQLite driver + migration runner
description: Choose better-sqlite3 (synchronous, zero-config, fast for the demo) behind a store-layer boundary so the documented Turso/libSQL cloud path is a later swap. Add a tiny migration runner: numbered SQL files in backend/migrations/*.sql applied in order, tracked in a _migrations table, run at boot (idempotent). TDD: backend/tests/unit/migrate.test.ts FIRST — applies pending, skips applied, errors surface. Files: /backend/src/stores/db.ts, /backend/src/stores/migrate.ts, /backend/migrations/, /backend/tests/unit/migrate.test.ts. Decision note: better-sqlite3 over libsql for build-day speed; interface keeps it swappable.
close_reason: better-sqlite3 openDb + transactional idempotent migration runner; 3 unit tests

title: Phase 7 — Dev Tooling & CI
description: ESLint flat config + Prettier (zero-warning policy), root npm scripts (build/test/test:coverage/lint/dev), and a blocking GitHub Actions CI gate (lint + build + coverage) across all workspaces.
close_reason: Phase complete

title: Phase 6 — Agent Seam Stub
description: backend/ The single Agent interface (research/build signatures) behind one module boundary, a deterministic MockAgent for token-free dev/test, plus a real Vercel-AI-SDK AnthropicAgent skeleton gated behind env so no tokens burn by default.
close_reason: Phase complete

title: Phase 5 — Persistence Foundation
description: backend/ SQLite driver decision + migration runner + the personas table and a PersonaStore behind a store interface (first persistence slice). Other tables stubbed for build day.
close_reason: Phase complete

title: Gate auth sub-routes (/runs/[id], /runs/gallery, /personas/[id]) with RequireAuth
description: Top-level /runs and /personas are wrapped in RequireAuth; sub-routes are reachable via in-app nav from gated parents but not themselves wrapped. Decide whether to gate them directly. Flagged by AuthIntegrate.
close_reason: Backlog cleared, merged to origin/main (3903357): flaky test fixed, sub-routes gated, SSE token-param auth.

title: Onboarding a11y: link inline field errors via aria-describedby + aria-invalid
description: The onboarding Field component renders inline errors with role=alert (announced on appearance), but the input is not programmatically linked to its error via aria-describedby, nor does it set aria-invalid. Inject these in the Field wrapper (cloneElement or pass-through props) so screen-reader users navigating fields hear the error. Small, well-scoped a11y polish.
close_reason: Shipped in beb0cc2; full gate green (223 tests, coverage 98.4/89.9/91.0, build clean).

title: Wire real web research in AnthropicAgent (provider lacks web_search/web_fetch)
description: Installed @ai-sdk/anthropic@1.2.12 exposes only bash/textEditor/computer tools — NOT the server-side web_search_20250305/web_fetch_20250910 the design assumes; ai@4.3.19 uses maxSteps not stepCountIs. AnthropicAgent.research() therefore returns empty sources. Resolve by: (a) upgrading @ai-sdk/anthropic to a version exposing web tools, or (b) an alternate research tool, then populate ResearchResult.sources. This blocks the research-sufficiency checkpoint pillar from real signal. Files: backend/src/agent/anthropic-agent.ts. Surfaced during bootstrap (publisher-3lc.6.2).
close_reason: Obsolete — real web_search research shipped via the native @anthropic-ai/sdk worker (dp0.4.5), now on origin/main.
